The Holdovers (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,355,375Details
International Box Office $25,701,309
Worldwide Box Office $46,056,684
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $555,102
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $564,540
Total $1,119,642
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A curmudgeonly instructor at a New England prep school is forced to remain on campus during the holiday break to babysit the handful of students with nowhere to go. Eventually, he forms an unlikely bond with one of them—a damaged, brainy troublemaker—and with the school’s head cook, who has just lost a son in Vietnam.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$211,093 (1.0% of total gross)
Legs:6.32 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$13,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:6 opening theaters/1,601 max. theaters, 6.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $22,176,448

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 27th, 2023 (Limited) by Focus Features
November 10th, 2023 (Expands Wide) by Focus Features

January 3rd, 2024 (Wide), released as Los Que se Quedan (Spain)
January 5th, 2024 (Wide) (Sweden)
Video Release: November 28th, 2023 by Focus Features
MPA Rating: R for language, some drug use and brief sexual material.

Synopsis

A curmudgeonly instructor at a New England prep school is forced to remain on campus during the holiday break to babysit the handful of students with nowhere to go. Eventually, he forms an unlikely bond with one of them—a damaged, brainy troublemaker—and with the school’s head cook, who has just lost a son in Vietnam.
